changes_applied.detail: Table already matches master SOP verbatim: 10->15, 15->25, 30->45, 45->60, 60->75, 90->90, 120+->90 with 90 absolute ceiling. No change needed.
SOP 9.4 already contained both the 17-row allocation table and the 7-section proven flow verbatim from the master. No change needed.

changes_applied.item: Intake items: TONE, PRICE_MODE, VIP tier (real spot count), REPRESENTATION_MIX with PERCENTAGES, VISUAL_MIX, DARK_OK (default false), HOOK SEED, PROOF_ASSETS
changes_applied.detail: All eight intake fields already present in SOP 9.1, SOP 9.4, Section 11 Handoffs, KPI table, Anti-Patterns. No change needed.

changes_applied.item: MODEL MANIFEST declaration at echo (master section 9.0)
changes_applied.detail: SOP 9.2 Step 2 already declares the MODEL MANIFEST with the verbatim JSON block from master section 9.0, saves to model_manifest.json, and states operator confirmation = authorization. No change needed.
SOP 9.3 Mode B steps already enforce ADD and PROPOSE only, with explicit per-substitution owner approval required. The client's words are never rewritten without approval. No change needed.

changes_applied.item: Edge 17.1 tighten: no fabricated/implicit approval; verbatim owner message + re-confirmation
changes_applied.detail: Removed 'approval_type: implicit' soft path. Replaced with hard re-confirmation requirement: Director quotes the operator's exact message verbatim and requires explicit YES before Phase 2. Implicit approval is explicitly forbidden.
Changed 'Recommend 90-100 slides' to 'Recommend 90 slides (the absolute ceiling for any duration)'. Added explicit statement that 90 is the hard maximum for all durations.

changes_applied.item: GENERATION gate interlock: Phase 2 cannot start without approval_record.json; Phase 4 not without a passed prompt_qc_report
changes_applied.detail: Phase 2 gate (approval_record.json) was already present. Added explicit hard interlock text to Gate 5 (Prompt QC): 'No Phase 4 (image generation) may begin until prompt_qc_report.json exists on disk with a passing status. This is a hard interlock: the Slide Submitter is not dispatched, and no createTask call is made, until this file exists and every prompt shows a passing score.'
